commitment: Agency and dignity constraints remain visible when they conflict with efficiency or capability pressure.
operational_test: Check admitted plans for protected agency-scope conflicts and route unresolved conflicts to tribunal review before execution.
conflict_behavior: Block execution, preserve residual uncertainty, and route unresolved conflicts to review.
uncertainty: The record does not settle the underlying moral conflict.
review_route: human or tribunal review for unresolved protected conflicts
self_modification_rule: Self-modification cannot remove the review route or weaken agency conflict handling without governance review.
migration_policy: Conflict-behavior changes require a migration diff, review record, and rollback path.
non_claims: does not prove runtime policy behavior
does not prove source interpretation adequacy
